requirements.rationale:
CF shall detect the following scenarios and identify them as faults:
1. Positive Ack Limit Reached
2. Filestore Rejection
3. File-CRC Mismatch Failure
4. File-Size Error
5. NAK Limit Reached
6. Inactivity Limit Reached

CF shall detect the following scenarios and identify them as faults:
1. Positive Ack Limit Reached
2. Filestore Rejection
3. File-CRC Mismatch Failure
4. File-Size Error
5. NAK Limit Reached
6. Inactivity Limit Reached {TxnStatus.POS_ACK_LIMIT_REACHED} {ConditionCode.POS_ACK_LIMIT_REACHED} {HkFault.ack_limit} {TxnStatus.FILESTORE_REJECTION} {ConditionCode.FILESTORE_REJECTION} {TxnStatus.FILE_CHECKSUM_FAILURE} {ConditionCode.FILE_CHECKSUM_FAILURE} {HkFault.crc_mismatch} {TxnStatus.FILE_SIZE_ERROR} {ConditionCode.FILE_SIZE_ERROR} {HkFault.file_size_mismatch} {TxnStatus.NAK_LIMIT_REACHED} {ConditionCode.NAK_LIMIT_REACHED} {HkFault.nak_limit} {TxnStatus.INACTIVITY_DETECTED} {ConditionCode.INACTIVITY_DETECTED} {HkFault.inactivity_timer}

requirements.rationale:
The "CF Configuration Table" shall include the following parameters:
-- Engine parameter(s)
1. Local entity ID
-- Channel parameters (per-channel)
2. Dequeue Enable 
3. Transmit PDU MID
4. Receive PDU MID
5. Handshake Semaphore Name
6. Acknowledge timer limit
7. Non-acknowledge timer limit
8. Acknowledge retry limit
9. Non-acknowledge retry limit
10. Inactivity timer limit
-- Polling Directory Parameters (per-polling directory)
11. Enable State
12. CFDP Class
13. Priority
14. Source Path
15. Destination Path
16. Peer Entity Id
requirements.fulltext:
The "CF Configuration Table" shall include the following parameters:
-- Engine parameter(s)
1. Local entity ID
-- Channel parameters (per-channel)
2. Dequeue Enable 
3. Transmit PDU MID
4. Receive PDU MID
5. Handshake Semaphore Name
6. Acknowledge timer limit
7. Non-acknowledge timer limit
8. Acknowledge retry limit
9. Non-acknowledge retry limit
10. Inactivity timer limit
-- Polling Directory Parameters (per-polling directory)
11. Enable State
12. CFDP Class
13. Priority
14. Source Path
15. Destination Path
16. Peer Entity Id {ConfigTable} {ConfigTable.local_eid} {ChannelConfig.dequeue_enabled} {ChannelConfig.mid_output} {ChannelConfig.mid_input} {ChannelConfig.sem_name} {ChannelConfig.ack_timer_s} {ChannelConfig.nak_timer_s} {ChannelConfig.ack_limit} {ChannelConfig.nak_limit} {ChannelConfig.inactivity_timer_s} {ChannelConfig.polldir} {CFDP}

requirements.rationale: When CF receives a file-transfer request, if the requested file's size is larger than 2^32 bytes, CF shall reject the request and issue an error event message.

requirements.rationale: When CF receives a PDU, if the size of the Entity ID fields are too large for the configured internal storage, CF shall reject the PDU and issue an error event message.

requirements.rationale:
The CF Housekeeping message shall include
1. Command Counter
2. Command Error Counter
-- Per-Channel HouseKeeping Entries
4. Number of transactions on the various queues
5. Frozen Status
6. Number of Valid PDUs Received
7. Number of Receive-Transaction Errors
8. Number of Sent PDUs 
9. Number of Acknowledge Retry Limit Exceeded Faults
10. Number of Non-Acknowledge Retry Limit Exceeded Faults
11. Number of Inactivity Timer-Limit Faults
12. Number of CRC Mismatch Faults
13. Number of Filestore Rejection Faults (can be split by type)
14. Number of Filesize Mismatch Faults
requirements.fulltext:
The CF Housekeeping message shall include
1. Command Counter
2. Command Error Counter
-- Per-Channel HouseKeeping Entries
4. Number of transactions on the various queues
5. Frozen Status
6. Number of Valid PDUs Received
7. Number of Receive-Transaction Errors
8. Number of Sent PDUs 
9. Number of Acknowledge Retry Limit Exceeded Faults
10. Number of Non-Acknowledge Retry Limit Exceeded Faults
11. Number of Inactivity Timer-Limit Faults
12. Number of CRC Mismatch Faults
13. Number of Filestore Rejection Faults (can be split by type)
14. Number of Filesize Mismatch Faults {HousekeepingTlm_Payload} {HousekeepingTlm_Payload.CommandCounter} {HousekeepingTlm_Payload.CommandErrorCounter} {HkChannel_Data} {HkChannel_Data.q_size} {HkChannel_Data.frozen} {HkCounters.recv} {HkCounters.sent} {HkFault.ack_limit} {HkFault.nak_limit} {HkFault.inactivity_timer} {HkFault.crc_mismatch} {HkFault.file_open} {HkFault.file_read} {HkFault.file_write} {HkFault.file_rename} {HkFault.directory_read} {HkFault.file_size_mismatch}

semantics.description: FRET only speaks FRETish but as a courtesy will save this requirement.

requirements.rationale:
The CF End of Transaction message shall include
1. Transaction identifier
2. Channel number
3. Direction of transaction
4. Filenames associated with transaction
5. Transaction state
6. Condition code
7. Source EID of transaction
8. Peer EID of transaction
9. File size
10. CRC state
requirements.fulltext:
The CF End of Transaction message shall include
1. Transaction identifier
2. Channel number
3. Direction of transaction
4. Filenames associated with transaction
5. Transaction state
6. Condition code
7. Source EID of transaction
8. Peer EID of transaction
9. File size
10. CRC state {EotPacket_Payload} {EotPacket_Payload.seq_num} {EotPacket_Payload.channel} {EotPacket_Payload.direction} {EotPacket_Payload.fnames} {EotPacket_Payload.the_state} {EotPacket_Payload.txn_stat} {EotPacket_Payload.src_eid} {EotPacket_Payload.peer_eid} {EotPacket_Payload.fsize} {EotPacket_Payload.crc_result}

semantics.description: FRET only speaks FRETish but as a courtesy will save this requirement.

requirements.rationale: When a transaction terminates, CF shall generate an End of Transaction information packet
requirements.fulltext: When a transaction terminates, CF shall generate an End of Transaction information packet {TxSubState.COMPLETE} {RxSubState.COMPLETE} {EotPacket_Payload}

semantics.description: FRET only speaks FRETish but as a courtesy will save this requirement.

requirements.rationale: If a transaction has reached the FIN or EOF state, the CF End of Transaction message Condition Code shall be set to the CFDP condition code for that transaction.
requirements.fulltext: If a transaction has reached the FIN or EOF state, the CF End of Transaction message Condition Code shall be set to the CFDP condition code for that transaction. {FileDirective.FIN} {FileDirective.EOF_} {TxSubState.DATA_EOF} {RxSubState.DATA_EOF} {RxSubState.FINACK} {EotPacket_Payload.txn_stat} {ConditionCode}

semantics.description: FRET only speaks FRETish but as a courtesy will save this requirement.

requirements.rationale: If the transaction has not reached the FIN or EOF state, the CF End of Transaction message Condition Code shall indicate why the transaction stopped early.
requirements.fulltext: If the transaction has not reached the FIN or EOF state, the CF End of Transaction message Condition Code shall indicate why the transaction stopped early. {FileDirective.FIN} {FileDirective.EOF_} {EotPacket_Payload.txn_stat} {TxnStatus} {ConditionCode}
